categories.name: Achievements
categories.desc: Official, complete list: 42 trophies/achievements, identical on Steam and PSN. The Shadow of the Erdtree DLC added no new trophies — the Platinum only covers the base game.
items: Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon

categories.name: Weapons
categories.desc: Complete list of the game's weapons (40 categories), organized by type. Re-verified via official source (wiki.gg) — reliable data.

categories.name: Armor
categories.desc: Click a set to see its 4 pieces (Helm, Chest, Gauntlets, Legs) and check them individually. Helm names have been verified from an official source; the other 3 pieces still show a placeholder until verified.
